HHPCommonRules.HHPDesc9: At every spin, any combinations of 3 or more symbols touching horizontally, vertically or diagonally will result in a winning combination.
HHPCommonRules.HHPDesc12: After payout is made, all winning combinations will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade in.
HHPCommonRules.HHPDesc13: Additional winning combination will be tallied until no more winning combination can be tallied.
HHPCommonRules.HHPDesc15: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol and Bomb symbol.
HHPCommonRules.HHPDesc16: Wild symbol, Free Spins symbol and Bomb symbol does not appear at the start of any main game spin.

HHPGameRules.HHPDesc1: Hip Hop Panda is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring a Chain Combo Gameplay and Free Spins symbol which awards free spins with increased bonus multipliers.

HHPDesc2.value: The game is played with 30 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
HHPDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
HHPDesc2.example: The game is played with 30 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 1.

HHPGameRules.HHPDesc11: A symbol win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet multiplier. This amount is also multiplied by any applicable multipliers.
HHPGameRules.HHPDesc17: Free Spins Feature are played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc1: The Bonus Multiplier Reel is positioned above the reels.
HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc2: At the start of every main game spin, 5 unique randomly selected symbols (excluding Wild symbol, Free Spins symbol and Bomb symbol) will appear in the Bonus Multiplier Reel.
HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc3: If one or more winning combinations match with any of the symbols on the Bonus Multiplier Reel, the multipliers of those symbols will be activated and those winning combinations will be multiplied by their corresponding multiplier value.
HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc4: While the symbols are cascading in, those activated multipliers will be removed, and the multipliers will cascade in the Bonus Multiplier Reel from left to right.
HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc5: All multipliers in the Bonus Multiplier Reel will reset to x2 at the start of every main game spin.
HHPFeature.HHPBonusMultiplierDesc6: During main game spin, the highest multiplier that can cascade into the Bonus Multiplier Reel is x30.
HHPFeature.HHPBombFeatureDesc1: When there is no winning combination on the reels, if there is one or more Bomb symbol on the reels, all Bomb symbol will explode and destroy all symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Free Spins symbol) surrounding that Bomb symbol.
HHPFeature.HHPBombFeatureDesc2: After bomb explosion, new symbols will cascade into the reels and additional winning combination will be tallied if any.
HHPFeature.HHPFreeSpinsDesc1: One or more Free Spins symbol appearing anywhere on the reels at the end of each spin will trigger Free Spins Feature with 3 free spins awarded for every Free Spins symbol.
HHPFeature.HHPFreeSpinsDesc2: All multipliers in the Bonus Multiplier Reel will reset to x5 at the start of every free spin.
HHPFeature.HHPFreeSpinsDesc3: During free spins, the highest multiplier that can cascade into the Bonus Multiplier Reel is x50.
HHPFeature.HHPFreeSpinsDesc4: Any Free Spins symbol appearing during free spins will trigger 3 additional free spins.
